name: Encrypted Channel with Self-Signed Certificates
description: Detects outbound TLS connections to hosts with self-signed or untrusted certificates
query:
// Detect connections to self-signed TLS endpoints
// Trigger on proxy blocks for certificate errors
events from proxy
where status_code = 502
  and category matches "(?i)(ssl-error|certificate-error|untrusted)"
group by source_ip, domain
having count(*) > 3
within 300 seconds
